content: Group 1: Core exported functions - estimate_parametric_hrf.R, single_voxel_sanity_check.R
Group 4: Exported utilities - diagnostics.R, internal-utils.R, fast_batch_convolution.R
Group 5: Internal engine functions - hrf-estimation-engine.R, parametric-engine.R, prepare-parametric-inputs.R
Group 6: Internal utilities - batch_convolution.R, bounds-utils.R, convergence-config.R
Group 7: Validation and helpers - validation-core.R, validation-helpers.R, utils-hrf-estimation.R
Group 9: Advanced features - gauss-newton-refinement.R, local-recentering.R, estimation-stages.R
Group 10: Other files - bayesian_engine.R, engineering-standards.R, fit-metrics.R, ridge_linear_solver.R
